name: Mad Scientist Clicker: Idle Crazy Inc
author: Poki
description: Mad Scientist Clicker: Idle Crazy Inc is a clicker game where you need to run an evil corporation and defend it from relentless robbers! As the newly appointed director, you have various rooms within the company that generate revenue. To safeguard these coins from robbery, you must assign one security guard to each room. These security guards are crazy creatures from your company with unique powers. Use the rewards earned from successfully beating robbers to upgrade your guards. Fight together with your guard and click on enemies to cause damage. The more battles you engage in, the stronger your company becomes! Are you prepared to manage and defend your evil corporation? How to play Mad Scientist Clicker: Idle Crazy Inc? Click on the robbers to cause damage. Who created Mad Scientist Clicker: Idle Crazy Inc? Mad Scientist Clicker: Idle Crazy Inc is created by Art Industries. Play their other games on Poki: Zombie Dying: Survival Days , Stickman Crazy Box , Stickman Parkour 2: Lucky Block and Stickman Parkour Skyland ! How can I play Mad Scientist Clicker: Idle Crazy Inc for free? You can play Mad Scientist Clicker: Idle Crazy Inc for free on Poki. Can I play Mad Scientist Clicker: Idle Crazy Inc on mobile devices and desktop? Mad Scientist Clicker: Idle Crazy Inc can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
